title: Cuppa Sneaks
excerpt: Just a little sneak peek at what I made with Studio Calico's November kit, Cuppa . I got the Scrapbook Kit, Card Kit, and Add-on #3 - Chai #3. I had the pleasure of designing the exclusive stamp set in…
body:
Just a little sneak peek at what I made with Studio Calico's November kit, Cuppa. I got the Scrapbook Kit, Card Kit, and Add-on #3 - Chai #3.

I had the pleasure of designing the exclusive stamp set in Add-On #3, Chai. It still is so cool seeing my hand writing on products. Even cooler when I get to see the products used in your projects. These kits will all be available on October 27th only at Studio Calico.
